title: AFLR Soundpack
description:
The recommended companion soundpack for ArdisFoxx's Lewd Roleplaying (AFLR, module id ardisfoxxs-lewd-pf2e). A curated selection of voice profiles and ambient SFX that expands AFLR's full audio feature set: escalating moans, climax / edge / struggle / defeat voices, cumflation lines, positional plaps, oral and fingering SFX, and cumflation stings. AFLR auto-detects it once enabled.

Audio credit: All voice and sound-effect audio is from the OpenNSFW Sound Pack, licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0). This is an SFX pack - please contact @OpenNSFWSP rather than individual contributors. See CREDITS.txt at the module root and 'README - OpenNSFW SFX Pack Terms.pdf' in the aflp-sfx folder.

recommends.reason: Host module the soundpack provides audio for (PF2e).
